title: senecio matatini subsp. toa
intro: Senecio matatini subsp. toa is a plant species native to the island of Tahiti, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its traditional medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio matatini subsp. toa include its ability to ease coughs, reduce fever, and promote relaxation, making it a valuable remedy for soothing respiratory discomfort. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, allowing its medicinal properties to be absorbed and utilized for its health benefits.
